segment.source: A conversion block with an optional intro heading above two side-by-side cards, each holding its own title, rich-text description, and button (the right one styled as outline). Use it for: documents offering two distinct next steps — contact sales vs. start a trial, download vs. read the docs, two audiences or product lines. Prefer 'Dual CTA Hero' at the very top of a page; 'Compare Two Options' when the two panels compare rather than convert.
